titleStmt.title: SII 9.145: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 145. (A.R. No. 86 of 1904.) ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 4, Siddhārthi, Jyēshṭha, amāvāsye, Vaḍḍavāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa. The date is irregular. If Jyēshṭha is a mistake for Pausha the details would regularly correspond to A.D. 1079, December 26, Thursday on which day there was a solar eclipse. The inscription refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva whose feudatory Pāṇḍyadēva is stated to have been ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand. It records that, in the presence of the learned Mahājanas of the village Bāguḷi, Bāchaladēvi, daughter Kaliyama-Gauḍa of Arasiyakeṟe and wife of Piriyāḍa-Pergaḍe, made a gift of land for the service of god Kalidēva of the village. Piriyāḍa-Pergaḍe also made a grant of money and a portion of tollrevenue.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ . jayaṁti bāṇāsuramauḷilāḷitā daśāsyacūḍā
maṇicakracuṁbinaḥ . surāsurādhīśaśikhāntaśāyinōbhavacchida
stryaṁbakapādapāṁsavaḥ . kalīśaṁ namāmītyaharnniśaṁ saṁbhavēt .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja pa
ramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhiyiṁ
kalyāṇada nalevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire
tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapañcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍa
ḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍā
maṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārtaṁḍaṁ paricchīdigaṇḍa nigaḷaṁkamalla pāṁḍyadēva
rasaru noṇaṁbavāḍi mūvattitsāsiramaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ
rājyaṁgeyuttamire . jaḷanidhiparivṛtadhātrītaḷadoḷ bhūvanitagesava
kuṁtaḷameṁtaṁtaḷavaḍe kuṁtaḷa�yakkaḷaṁkṛtaṁ bāḷguḷipuraṁ sogayisugu .
Idu puṇya dodavu lōka�du sukhadoṁdēḷgeyeṁdu bāḷguḷipuradoḷ tridaśamu
ni vaṁdu niśaṁ mudadiṁ śrīkallināthanalliye nindaṁ . kayvārada yācakajanamu
yvaṁ nōḍalke dhanavanavanītaḷadoḷ kayvāradīvavarenaliṁdayvatiṁbara jasakke
sariyārdhareyoḷ . Antenisi yamaniyamasyādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa
pārāyaṇajapasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpannaruṁ yajanayājanādhyaya
nādhyāpanadānapratigrahayuktarumagniṣṭōmādisaptasamsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanapavi
trīkṛtaśarīraruṁ śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēvapādārādhakaruṁ śrimahāla
kṣmīvaraprasādarumappa śrīmadu hariścaṁdradattiya mahāgrahāraṁ bā
ḷguḷiyūroḍeyapramukhavaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷayvadiṁbara sasnidhānadoḷ .
sakaḷaguṇasaṁpannanappa bikkiganerppattaṟoḷagaṇa Arasiyakeṟe mahāpra
bhu kaliyamagauḍana magaḷu kaṇaka piriyāḍaperggaḍeya manōvallabhe
yabhinavapārvvatiyenisida bācaladēviyaru cāḷukyavikramavarṣada 4 lkeneya
siddhārtthisaṁvatsarada jyēṣṭhadamāvāse vaḍḍavāra sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdu Arasiya
keṟeya gauḍikeyiṁ tavage naḍeva tējasvāmyadiṁduḷḷa dhanabhūmiyani
tumaṁ śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēvaraṁgabhōga raṁgabhōgake brāhmaṇaragrāsanakkaṁ purāṇa
kkaṁ śivaśaktipaṁḍitara kālaṁ karci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍidaḷā bhūmiya sīmeyarasi
yakeṟeya baḍagaṇa javalageṟeya koḷa 1 Ā keṟeya keḷage kisumatturu 1 Alliṁ
baḍagalu māciseṭṭiya keṟeya paḍuvaṇa bāykalla baḷiviḍidu huṇiseyabā
ykalliṁ teṁkalu gadde mattaru 2 hosageṟeya bāykalliṁ mūḍalu gadde kamma 600
dāḷiya hosageṟeya keḷagekāyvaḷḷadiṁ mūḍalu gadde kamma 300 Ā keṟe
ya mūḍaṇa kālvaṭṭeyiṁ baḍagalu nīruguṁdada heddāriyiṁ paḍuvalu ke
yi mattaru 3 yiṁtī bhūmiyuma(ṁ)nūroḷage huṭuva hārikāyavaḷava
tūguva bhaṁḍake hoṁge hāga 1 gāṇavāri gāṇaṁprati māna 1 Asagarokkalu ni
baṁdi hiḍiyade sīre 1 Upina kāvalideṟe pratēkaṁ paṇa 5 Uppu koḷaga 5 yiṁti
vu modalāgiyāyādāyasahitaṁ sarvvabādheparihāraṁmāḍi bikkiga bīrabhaṭṭa
nanumatediṁ dēvara śrīpādakke dhāreyaneṟedu biṭṭaḷu mattavā dibyatithiyo
ḷ kaṇaka piriyāḍaperggaḍegaḷu bikkiganerppattanāḷuttirdda Arasiyakeṟeya mūliga
māciseṭṭi koṭṭa gaddege teṟuva gadyāṇa 3 ma 6 Ā keṟeya koḷavagadyāṇa 1 ma 2 muḍiya
rāmēśvarada taṁ ḍigadyāṇa 3 ma 6 Uppinika gauḍagadyāṇa 1 ma 2 bōvagadyāṇa 1 ma 2 ba
ḍagi kammāṟa dyāṇa 1 ma 2 mādara gadyāṇa 1 ma 2 yintu gadyāṇaṁ 13 ma 2 śrīsva
yaṁbhukalidēvara naṁdādīvigege bikkiga bīrabhaṭana saṁmatadiṁ mūligadeṟeyiṁ
jīvita māṟi hoṟavaṭṭu hōha suṁka sahita dhāreyaneṟedu biṭṭaru . namaśśivāya .
Digital edition of SII 9.145 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
